hero.title: Gumball
hero.description: A fast-paced 3D action roguelike where you play as a gumball machine, shooting bouncing candy to survive waves of enemies. Build your loadout, and reclaim your mall before it's too late.

sprints.headline: 4-Month Sprints.
sprints.description: We believe in momentum. By constraining our development cycles, we force creative innovation and deliver polished, high-octane experiences without the bloat.

main.title: Scope Control
main.description: How small scope leads to bigger audiences. We refine the core loop until it's perfect before adding a single piece of fluff.

secondary1.title: Agile Focus
secondary1.description: Zero technical debt. Just pure playability.

secondary2.title: Community Driven
secondary2.description: Every sprint cycle ends with a public playtest. You shape the game.

features.title: The
features.description: We don't just build games; we engineer loops. Our obsession with procedural generation and permanent progression ensures that no two runs of Gumball Hero are ever the same.

items.title: Procedural Perfection
items.description: Algorithms that prioritize flow over randomness.

items.title: Kinetic Combat
items.description: High-fidelity physics interaction that feels snappy and responsive.

founders.title: The
founders.description: The visionaries behind the machine, engineering the future of roguelike loops.

list.name: Zaid
list.description: Driving the studio's vision and strategic growth in the global gaming market.

list.name: Salem
list.description: Architecting high-performance procedural systems and kinetic combat engines.

list.name: Mohammed
list.description: Optimizing development pipelines and ensuring peak studio performance.

cta.title: Ready to Defend the Mall?
cta.description: Join other heroes in the fight. Wishlist Gumball Hero now to get notified the second we launch into Early Access.

slides.title: THREE COINS STUDIO

slides.title: Every run/build can be viable and yet different
slides.content: Playing as Sigma from Overwatch. Roguelike: every SHOT is different - Gumball Hero (our product).

items.label: 30 days
items.value: finish the project

items.label: 60 days
items.value: finalize the project → release. Start validating the next project

items.label: 90 days
items.value: start pre-production and production on next project
1- We don't put all our eggs in the one basket, just like you.

2- We're very coachable and eager to learn when it comes to business development, at the same time we are confident in making decisions on our own and subsequently face the challenges that comes with those decisions.
3- We have an inside view at the market, both globally and locally, not only do we know what the market needs, but we also know how to make it. We also know who's a competitor and who's not.
4- We know when to say "No" and we also know when to say "Yes". We don't bite more than we can chew, and every risk we take is preceded by all the certainty we can muster.
5- We're fully invested in this company, we chose this industry knowing full well its challenges and having experienced its tribulations first hand. We've decided to move forward regardless.
6- We handle money like a mother handles a baby, it's only meant to grow. check Financials for more details.
